dataList.content:
<size=75%>View the 1st event Story Stage 
to Unlock</size>

During the event period, deploying the following Identities on your team will
boost the amount of <color=#96beee>[Photos]</color> earned.
You can earn a maximum of <color=#96beee>120%</color> boost to the amount of event currency earned.

You can obtain <color=#96beee>[Photos]</color> from first-time Event/Main Story Stages completions, or by clearing the Mirror Dungeon.
You also have a small chance to obtain <color=#96beee>[Photo Bundles]</color> in the process.

<color=#96beee>[Photo Bundles]</color> are immediately converted to 20 <color=#96beee>[Photos]</color> upon acquisition.

Earn <color=#96beee>[Photos]</color> via the following methods:
First-time Event Stage & Main Story Stage clears and Mirror Dungeon clears.

In the <color=#96beee>[Reward Exchange]</color> window, you can purchase various rewards
by spending <color=#96beee>[Photos]</color> you have collected.
